summary.para: All job configuration, model state and results are deleted. It is not currently possible to delete multiple jobs using wildcards or a comma separated list. If you delete a job that has a datafeed, the request first tries to delete the datafeed. This behavior is equivalent to calling the delete datafeed API with the same timeout and force parameters as the delete job request.
Specifies whether annotations that have been added by the user should be deleted along with any auto-generated annotations when the job is reset.
Use to forcefully delete an opened job; this method is quicker than closing and deleting the job.
Identifier for the anomaly detection job.
Specifies whether the request should return immediately or wait until the job deletion completes.
